about.title: A Decade of Excellence in Power Charging Solutions
about.lead: Founded in 2013, Yangzi Power is a leading high-tech manufacturer specializing in advanced battery charging technology.
about.description: With over 11 years of experience, we operate a 3,000+ sqm state-of-the-art facility in Guangdong, China. We specialize in developing and manufacturing smart chargers for LiFePO4, Lithium-ion, and Lead-acid batteries, serving global markets including Europe, North America, and Southeast Asia. Our commitment to quality is reflected in our rigorous end-to-end testing and comprehensive international certifications.

points.title: Advanced R&D Lab
points.desc: In-house engineering team focused on high-efficiency power conversion and smart charging algorithms.

points.title: 100% Burn-in Test
points.desc: Every single charger undergoes full-load aging tests for 4+ hours before leaving the factory.

points.title: Global Safety Certifications
points.desc: Full compliance with international standards ensuring safe operation in any market.

categories.name: LiFePO4 Chargers
categories.description: High-stability chargers for Lithium Iron Phosphate battery packs, optimized for cycle life and safety.

categories.name: Li-ion Chargers
categories.description: Precise voltage control for NMC/Lithium Polymer batteries, perfect for E-mobility and power tools.

categories.name: Lead Acid Chargers
categories.description: Heavy-duty smart chargers for SLA, AGM, and Gel batteries with multi-stage maintenance mode.

features.title: Smart Protection
features.desc: Built-in protection against over-voltage, over-current, short-circuit, and reverse polarity.

features.title: Efficient Cooling
features.desc: Premium aluminum alloy casing and high-speed fans ensure optimal thermal management.

features.title: Universal Input
features.desc: Wide AC 100-240V input range compatible with power grids worldwide.

features.title: Auto Shut-off
features.desc: Intelligent multi-stage charging with automatic cut-off to prevent battery overcharging.

certifications.name: CE Certified
certifications.desc: Complies with European health, safety, and environmental protection standards.

certifications.name: FCC Compliant
certifications.desc: Certified for electromagnetic interference requirements in the United States.

certifications.name: ROHS Standard
certifications.desc: Restriction of Hazardous Substances compliant for eco-friendly manufacturing.

certifications.name: SAA Approved
certifications.desc: Meets strict electrical safety requirements for Australia and New Zealand.
